turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, umm, I'm a bit anxious about this but I think I need a mental health consultation. Do you have a psychiatrist?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we do, and please don't hesitate — reaching out is an important step. Dr. Radhika Menon is our psychiatrist and she's very compassionate. Her next available slot is Wednesday at 3 PM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Wednesday at 3... yeah, okay. I can do that.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I'd rather not say on the phone if that's okay. Is that possible?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course, absolutely. I'll book the slot and you can share your name at registration when you arrive. I'll just note a contact number for a reminder.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done. Wednesday at 3 PM with Dr. Menon. All your information is kept strictly confidential. We'll send a reminder to this number. You're doing the right thing by calling.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thank you. That means a lot.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We'll see you Wednesday. Please take care of yourself.
